name: @vantasdk/vanta-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Vanta's security compliance platform

tools.name: tests
tools.description: Retrieves Vanta's automated security and compliance tests. It allows filtering by status, integration, or framework to quickly assess pass/fail posture.

tools.name: list_test_entities
tools.description: Fetches resources monitored by a specific test, including any failing entities that require remediation.

tools.name: controls
tools.description: Lists security controls within your Vanta account or retrieves details for a specific control using its ID, including framework mapping information.

tools.name: list_control_tests
tools.description: Enumerates automated tests that validate a particular control, providing its status and details about failing entities.

tools.name: list_control_documents
tools.description: Lists documents that are mapped to a control, helping to quickly locate supporting evidence.

tools.name: documents
tools.description: Lists compliance documents or fetches detailed information for a specific document, including its metadata.

tools.name: document_resources
tools.description: Retrieves resources (such as controls, links, or uploads) that are linked to a document, allowing the user to specify the desired resource type.

tools.name: integrations
tools.description: Lists integrations connected to your Vanta account or provides details for a specific integration, including its resource kinds and connection status.

tools.name: integration_resources
tools.description: Allows inspection of integration resource kinds, schema information, full resource lists, or a specific resource by selecting from supported operations.

tools.name: frameworks
tools.description: Lists compliance frameworks, showing their completion status and progress metrics.

tools.name: list_framework_controls
tools.description: Retrieves controls associated with a compliance framework, including their descriptions and implementation guidance.

tools.name: people
tools.description: Lists individuals across your organization or allows looking up a specific person by ID, providing their role, email, and group membership metadata.

tools.name: risks
tools.description: Lists risk scenarios currently under management or fetches details for a specific scenario to review its status, scoring, and treatment plans.

tools.name: vulnerabilities
tools.description: Lists detected vulnerabilities or retrieves specific vulnerability items, including CVE metadata, severity, and impacted assets.
